== Notes for [[Item:Q101342|Q101342]] ==

Pretended to be a "Muslim" in a mixed Muslim - Jewish village in christian Spain. In this village there were no christian Spaniards, only the Muslim majority and some Jewish families. This way he and his descendants succeeded to escape the christian persecution by inquisition and stayed as "Muslim" Crypto-Jews in this village very long time even after Expulsion of Jews in 1492. Their descendants have stayed in this village even after Expulsion of Muslims from Spain in 1609, as this whole village, which was before the 1609 Expulsion 100% Muslim, have fully converted to catholicism just before the Expulsion of Moriscos from Spain. They have stayed as "Christian" Crypto-Jews in this village even long time after having overtly converted to christianity.

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051AD9CE68D1EFBBFA9822EF79916C297A
geni:6000000026490112829

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
